name: twitch-giveaway-wheel
description: Twitch Giveaway Wheel monorepo with React, Fastify, Prisma, and Twitch EventSub.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,magenta "npm run start --workspace backend" "npm run preview --workspace frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173"
